section.div: Source code of extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
Source extensions for the Tachiyomi app.
This script will fetch seasonal anime data from MyAnimeList (both Normal and Hentai) and Hentai anime data from NekoPoi and save it in a specified format.
This script will automatically rename any NekoPoi titles (well its for all video titles btw, but mainly used for NekoPoi)

Favorites genres: Comedy, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Romance

div.div: Sekai Saikou no Ansatsusha, Isekai Kizoku ni Tensei suru 2nd Season
Action, Adventure, Drama, Fantasy, Mystery, Romance
The second season of Sekai Saikou no Ansatsusha, Isekai Kizoku ni Tensei suru.

Based on the erotic game by Lune. In the kingdom where the elves live, there is a strictly controlled law of race breeding. However, that rule is disrupted by a human man named "Ingwill". All the elves in the city. Dark Elves, the Queen's knights. Queen of the High Elves who rules the land. The virtuous princess, daughter of the queen. All of them are made aware of their true nature by "hypnosis"... Notes: - Download version was delivered in advance on January 1, 2022. - Physical version was delivered on January 28, 2022.
Arifureta Shokugyou de Sekai Saikyou 3rd season

The third season of Arifureta Shokugyou de Sekai Saikyou. En route to conquer a Great Labyrinth with his allies and former classmates, Hajime Nagumo is sidetracked by a tragedy that befalls his party member Shea Haulia. After encountering a group of rabbitmen caught in an ambush, Nagumo learns that members of Shea's Haulia Tribe have been abducted by soldiers of the Hoelscher Empire. To alleviate the anxiety of Shea, whose father may be in mortal danger, Nagumo decides to head toward the empire and rescue the missing Haulias. After arriving at his destination, Hajime is caught up in political turmoil between the empire and the Heiligh Kingdom. As princess Liliana S. B. Heiligh tries to formalize an alliance with the empire to protect her weakened kingdom against demon attacks, the Haulia Tribe plans to assassinate Emperor Gahard D. Hoelscher to free all rabbitmen from the empire's threat. Determined to protect his allies at any cost, Hajime will need to ignore all political considerations and unleash his unstoppable power on anyone who may stand in his way. (Source: MAL Rewrite)
Itai no wa Iya nano de Bougyoryoku ni Kyokufuri Shitai to Omoimasu. 2
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Slice of Life

The second season of Itai no wa Iya nano de Bougyoryoku ni Kyokufuri Shitai to Omoimasu. The best offense is a great defense, and for VRMMO gamer Kaede Honjo, her defense is the best. Under her alias Maple, she and her guild journey through NewWorld Online gaining friends and foes through new battle-filled quests. All those skill points, new defensive techniques, and no pain—Maple can’t be stopped! (Source: Crunchyroll) Note: Episode 1 was streamed in advance on December 17, 2022 on the KADOKAWA Anime YouTube Channel. The regular TV broadcast began on January 11, 2023.

A young boy, Mario, is asked by his father, who works for a video game company, to become the GM. Although he is not keen, as a result of his analysis, he realizes that he can experience the same stimulation he received in the game in real life, and as an experiment, he sets his sights on a quiet girl named Koharu Takashina. Koharu wishes to become “a useful and gorgeous character,” which is the opposite of reality. However, the class she is given is that of a prostitute! After being raped by a rough man, her womb starts tingling, even though she is still a virgin in real life...
(Source: PinkPineapple, translated)
Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life

The story of Jii-san Baa-san Wakagaeru follows Shouzou and Ine, an elderly couple who are living a quiet life in a farming village in Aomori Prefecture. After eating a mysterious apple that they discover on their apple farm, Shozo and Ine spontaneously regain their youth, but even after being reinvigorated they continue to live life at a grandparent-ly pace. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

Having spent his childhood in the slums, Hajime Shinonome desperately sought strength to survive.
Now, he enjoys a peaceful and carefree life as a resident adventurer of the Komai Village.
One day, during a quest, he ventured into a dungeon and finds a young girl being partially eaten by a weakest kind of monster, a slime!
The girl's name was Lirui. Having been abandoned by her parents, she had no place to go and entered the dungeon alone in order to stay alive. Hajime couldn't just leave her there, so he took her back to the village to live with him! (Source: Crunchyroll)

Using her wit and vast knowledge of medicines and poisons alike, Maomao played a pivotal role in solving a series of mysteries and conspiracies that plagued the imperial court. Having recently come to terms with the secrets of her parents, she returns to fulfill her normal duties on behalf of the emperor's highest-ranking consorts. Maomao also works alongside the eunuch Jinshi to better the consorts' many ladies-in-waiting, including helping them learn to read.
However, with the arrival of a merchant caravan comes a new wave of intrigue. A pattern of strange coincidences involving the visitors and their wares unsettles Maomao, driving her to investigate the puzzling circumstances behind the convoy. As dangers from both outside and within threaten the balance between the imperial concubines, Maomao continues to utilize her cunning and medical expertise to keep the women safe from harm.
(Source: MAL Rewrite)
Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Hentai, Romance

"Why did I turn into a character from an adult game?" The time has come now to take action! Lucius the loser character has transformed into a villain overnight. With his new found vengeance, Lucius will set out to enjoy the action packed, harem fantasy adventure!! (Source: TOPTOON+) Note: Includes four extra chapters.

He always thought he was just an ordinary guy, but he didn’t know that his yard was full of divine artifacts and the chickens he raised were actually phoenixes! It wasn’t until after five years of living in an ordinary village when the System finally allowed him to come into contact with cultivators. It was then that he discovered that no matter how strong someone was, the moment they saw him, they would be so intimidated that they would tremble in fear. Some would even kneel down and call him master…
(Source: Bilibili, translated)
Comedy, Drama, Hentai, Slice of Life
Still a virgin, I downloaded an app. [Welcome to 'The Heroine App'.]. I can get any girl I want with this app?! What am I waiting for? (Source: DAYcomics)
Ataerareta Skill wo Tsukatte Kasei de Isekai Bijotachi to Ichaicha shitai

That day, Ishida Yamada was working his part-time job as usual. After finishing his shift, he opened the back door and stepped into a vast, empty space, where he encountered a mysterious figure claiming to be God. By sheer chance, Ishida was chosen by this God to be transported to another world. Although confused and uncertain, he resolved to adapt and make a life for himself in this strange new place. Using the skills granted by God, he focused on surviving and thriving. As he explored different lands and encountered various races, he made it his mission to form close relationships with many beautiful women along the way.
